docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $110) SERVED MAY-16-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, ELLEN
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LINARES ZECENA, KEVIN AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, ELLEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION UPDATING NAME OF PLAINTIFF FROM KEVIN ZECENA TP KEVING LINARES ZECENA. FILED BY PLAINTIFF LINARES ZECENA, KEVIN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-26-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF KEVIN ZECENA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ELLEN CHIN IS PRESENT. COURT RECESS AT 9:27 A.M. TO ALLOW FOR PLAINTIFF TO LOCATE AND PRESENT TO THE COURT EVIDENCE OF WHAT HE HAS PAID OUT OF POCKET NOT COVERED BY PLAINTIFFS INSURANCE COMPANY FOR MEDICAL EXPENSES. COURT IS RECALLED AT 10:10 A.M. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LINARES ZECENA, KEVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHIN, ELLEN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $185.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,185.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, ELLEN
